question: Why is exposing /actuator/env without authentication a security risk?
options: It allows attackers to change environment variables remotely
It exposes all configuration properties including database passwords, API keys, and secrets
It reveals the server's IP address and port configuration
It allows the JVM heap to be dumped and read remotely

question: You implement HealthIndicator but your component never appears in /actuator/health. What is the most likely cause?
options: Custom health indicators require @EnableHealthIndicator on the main class
The class is missing @Component — Spring never registered it as a bean
HealthIndicator only works with @Repository and @Service beans
management.endpoint.health.show-details must be set to always for custom indicators

question: A Kubernetes liveness probe needs to hit an endpoint that returns HTTP 200 when the app is healthy and 503 when it's down. Which actuator endpoint is designed for this?
options: /actuator/info — returns app metadata including health status
/actuator/metrics/jvm.memory.used — reflects memory pressure
/actuator/health — returns UP (200) or DOWN (503) with component details
/actuator/beans — lists all beans, non-zero count means the app is running

question: A service is producing slow responses in production. You want to see average and max response time for POST /api/orders without restarting. Which endpoint helps?
options: /actuator/httptrace — shows the last 100 requests with individual durations
/actuator/metrics/http.server.requests?tag=uri:/api/orders — shows count, total time, max
/actuator/env — shows configuration including timeout settings
/actuator/threaddump — shows which threads are currently blocked

question: How do you enable DEBUG logging for com.example.service without restarting the application?
options: Edit application.yml and send SIGHUP to the process
POST to /actuator/loggers/com.example.service with body {"configuredLevel": "DEBUG"}
GET /actuator/loggers/com.example.service?level=DEBUG
Add logging.level.com.example.service=DEBUG to application.yml and restart
